turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe ek dietitian se milna hai. Apna weight manage karna chahta hoon properly.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bahut acha decision! Humare paas registered dietitian Ms. Pooja Tarte hain. Aapka naam aur number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Sameer ji. Ms. Tarte Somvaar, Budhwaar aur Shanivar ko available hoti hain. Kab aana chahenge?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shanivar 10 AM ka slot hai. Book kar doon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Sameer Kadam, Shanivar 10 AM, Ms. Pooja Tarte. SMS confirmation aayega. Best of luck with your health journey!
